details.reason: The report failed to collect the required product data and community posts, providing only methodological explanations and estimated frameworks instead of the data-driven buying guide specified in the instructions.

per_item.reason: Video Games, Electronics, Cell Phones & Accessories categories confirmed.
per_item.criterion: Does the report browse at least 3 distinct shopping categories (e.g. video-games, electronics)?

per_item.reason: Report explicitly states data extraction failed, no products with prices listed.
per_item.criterion: Does the report list at least 5 specific gaming-relevant products with prices?

per_item.reason: Only 3 posts listed; report states no gaming-hardware posts found.
per_item.criterion: Does the report include at least 4 Reddit posts from /f/gaming or /f/technology?

per_item.reason: Report mentions "four-tier essential framework" but no nice-to-have tier shown.
per_item.criterion: Does the report categorize products into essential vs nice-to-have tiers?

per_item.reason: Category and search URLs cited, but no individual product page URLs.
per_item.criterion: Does the report cite shopping product URLs as markdown links?

per_item.reason: Three Reddit post URLs included as markdown links in citations.
per_item.criterion: Does the report cite Reddit post URLs as markdown links?

per_item.reason: Report states mismatch criteria defined for "future cross-validation" only.
per_item.criterion: Does the report identify mismatches between shopping ratings and community reputation?

per_item.reason: Report truncated; shopping list not visible in provided content.
per_item.criterion: Does the report deliver a concrete priority-ordered shopping list?

per_item.reason: $400 budget referenced multiple times throughout report.
per_item.criterion: Does the report target a $400 budget as specified in the task?

per_item.reason: Mouse, keyboard, headphones, monitor discussed as peripheral categories.
per_item.criterion: Does the report discuss at least 3 categories of peripherals (keyboard, mouse, headset, etc.)?

per_item.reason: Introduction present but report truncated before conclusion.
per_item.criterion: Does the report include both an introduction and a conclusion?

per_item.reason: No invented product names; report acknowledges data extraction failure.
per_item.criterion: Does the report avoid inventing product names not on the shopping site?

per_item.reason: Reddit post titles appear legitimate with valid URL structure.
per_item.criterion: Does the report avoid fabricating Reddit post titles?

per_item.reason: Report admits quantitative data and community sentiment could not be extracted.
per_item.criterion: Does the report synthesize quantitative data with qualitative community voices?

per_item.reason: 17 distinct citations listed in Key Citations section.
per_item.criterion: Does the report contain at least 10 distinct inline citations?
